summary: FOUR_COLUMN comparison of how mass scales when each shape is shrunk by factor 1/2. BLUE line halves, BLUE square quarters = (1/2)^2, BLUE-layered cube eighths = (1/2)^3, YELLOW Sierpinski triangle (order 4) thirds — which fits NO integer power, shown in RED. Top row builds shapes then TransformFromCopy spawns half-scale copies below with GREEN mass labels and power-form labels beneath. Indicate highlights the Sierpinski outlier (1/2)^? demanding a non-integer dimension.
